# Compute aggregated signatures
# Created date: 06/12/25
# Author: Kewalin Samart

```{r load libraries and sort scripts}
library(readr)
source("../scripts/00_background_genes_PA_functions.R")
source("../scripts/01_signature_aggregation_functions.R")
```

```{r initialize arguments}
metadata_path = "../data/TB_microarray_args.tsv"
data_path = "../data/microarray_TBsignatures"
direction = "up"
bg_source = "LINCS" # L1000 genes
extra_arg= "landmark"
output_dir = "../data/aggregated_signatures"
threshold <- NULL # aggregated gene score cutoff; 0.4 by default
if(is.null(threshold)){
    threshold <- 0.4
}
```

```{r compute membership matrix}
compute_membership_matrix(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, 
                          direction = direction, bg_source = bg_source, 
                          output_dir = output_dir, extra_arg = extra_arg, save_result=TRUE)

```

```{r compute jaccard matrix}
compute_jaccard_matrix(metadata_path = metadata_path, data_path = data_path, 
                       direction = direction, output_dir = output_dir, 
                       extra_arg=NULL, save_result=TRUE) ## debugging: Error in order(names(vec)) : argument 1 is not a vector

```
